sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Jersey Mike’s Said to Work With Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan on IPO
feed.summary: Jersey Mike's Subs is reportedly collaborating with Morgan Stanley and JPMorgan Chase & Co. for an initial public offering (IPO). The Blackstone Inc.-backed sandwich chain, which boasts over 3,000 locations, aims to complete its first-time share sale as early as the third quarter of this year.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Shares Rise After BofA Upgrade
feed.summary: Shares of Microchip Technology rose after BofA Securities upgraded the company's rating to "Buy" from "Neutral" and increased its price target to $95 from $78. This upgrade follows several recent positive analyst adjustments and news regarding product expansions and insider transactions. Microchip Technology specializes in integrated semiconductors for various sectors including household appliances, automotive, and telecommunications.

feed.title: Dow Earnings Preview: Can Cost Cuts Offset Deepening Industry Slump? By Investing.com
feed.summary: Dow Inc. is expected to report another quarterly loss, with analysts projecting a 46 cents per share loss on $9.46 billion in revenue due to a challenging chemical industry environment. The company's stock trades at its average analyst target, indicating a difficult quarter is already priced in. Investors are focused on Dow's cost-cutting measures, such as facility closures, and the impact of global overcapacity and subdued demand on its financial performance and liquidity.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates' (JKHY) "Buy" Rating Reiterated at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) with a $190 price target, suggesting a 4.8% upside. The company surpassed its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and provided an optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the stock.

feed.title: A Look At Annaly Capital Management (NLY) Valuation As Earnings And Short Interest Draw New Attention
feed.summary: Annaly Capital Management (NLY) is approaching its Q4 2025 earnings report with increased short interest and expectations for higher revenue. While Simply Wall St's narrative model suggests NLY is slightly overvalued at $24.36 (fair value $23.34), their discounted cash flow (DCF) model indicates a significant undervaluation, with an estimated future cash flow value of $42.82. The article highlights the conflicting valuations and encourages readers to explore the underlying assumptions and risks.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) Price Target Raised to $106.00 at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has increased its price target for Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) to $106.00 from $102.00, reiterating a "buy" rating and suggesting a 15.71% upside. Other analysts have varying price targets and ratings, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $98.85 for the consumer products company. Church & Dwight recently surpassed Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and provided positive guidance for Q4 and FY2025.

feed.title: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) Given New $230.00 Price Target at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has raised its price target for Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) to $230.00, up from $210.00, maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 24.22% from the stock's previous close. Despite the positive analyst outlook, Albemarle shares traded down 4.6% to $185.16 during midday trading.

feed.title: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) Price Target Raised to $195.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) from $80.00 to $195.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 5.31%. This adjustment comes amidst several other firms, including HSBC and Deutsche Bank, also upgrading Albemarle's rating and price targets. Despite these upgrades, Albemarle's stock recently traded down by 4.6% to $185.16, influenced by negative trailing EPS and mixed revenue results.

feed.title: PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) Price Target Raised to $125.00 at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) to $125.00 from $118.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying a potential upside of 9.57%. This adjustment follows PPG's Q4 earnings, where revenue of $3.91 billion exceeded estimates, but EPS of $1.51 missed consensus forecasts, and FY2026 EPS guidance was slightly below Street expectations. Despite the EPS miss and some negative sentiment regarding regional softness, the stock rose 3.4% on the news, and analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $120.86.

feed.title: Target's incoming CEO addresses 'Minneapolis violence' in memo to employees
feed.summary: In a recent memo to employees, Target's incoming CEO, Michael Fiddelke, addressed the "violence and loss of life" in Minneapolis following two fatal shootings by immigration agents and the detention of two Target workers. While Target has refrained from a public statement, Fiddelke assured employees of the company's focus on safety and support, amid criticism of Minnesota's large companies for their perceived silence on the immigration crackdown and Target's recent struggles, including boycotts and falling off Fortune's "Most Admired All-Stars" list.

feed.title: Refresh Your Closet with the Coca‑Cola® x adidas Collection
feed.summary: Coca-Cola and Adidas are collaborating on a new collection featuring several footwear styles like the Samba, Superstar, F50, Predator, and Adilette Slides, set to release in Summer 2026. The collection incorporates special graphics, branding elements, and ruby-colored accents. This partnership is timed with the upcoming FIFA World Cup, recalling their previous collaboration during the 2002 World Cup.

feed.title: Oracle’s Data Center Attracts Potential Investment From Blackstone: Report
feed.summary: Blackstone is reportedly considering a debt investment in Oracle's Michigan data center project, which is part of the larger Stargate Project aimed at bolstering AI infrastructure. This comes amid declining Oracle shares and rising debt insurance costs, raising questions among some investors about the project's viability. Despite these concerns, representatives from Oracle, Bank of America, and Related Digital affirm that financing is progressing as planned for the project, which has faced regulatory and public scrutiny.

feed.title: PROG Holdings, Inc. to Release Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on February 18, 2026
feed.summary: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRG) announced it will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, before the market opens. The fintech holding company will also host a live webcast at 8:30 A.M. ET on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the webcast through the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: PROG Holdings, Inc. to Release Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on February 18, 2026
feed.summary: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, before market open. The fintech holding company will also host a live webcast at 8:30 AM ET on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the webcast via the investor relations section of the PROG Holdings website.

feed.title: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce becomes big Sleep Number investor
feed.summary: Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce has become an investor and strategic partner in Sleep Number, signing a three-year deal. This partnership makes him one of the company's top shareholders and aims to help improve its financial performance. Kelce will also serve as a spokesman for the smart bed company.

feed.title: Why has TikTok been glitching? Oracle says data center outage led to issues plaguing U.S. users
feed.summary: TikTok users in the U.S. experienced glitches and posting issues, leading to claims of censorship, particularly against anti-Trump and anti-ICE content. However, Oracle Corp., one of TikTok's new U.S. owners, stated that the technical problems were due to a weather-related power outage at a data center. This outage occurred shortly after TikTok's Chinese owner, ByteDance, finalized a deal to establish a U.S.-majority-owned joint venture to prevent a ban.

feed.title: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) Shares Gap Down - What's Next?
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) shares gapped down following its latest earnings report, despite beating Q4 estimates with EPS of $4.17 and revenue of $14.38 billion. The company reported a rising backlog of $118 billion, bolstered by a significant U.S. Navy contract win. However, concerns remain regarding a $41 million tariff hit, increased capital expenditure, and supply-chain cost pressures that could affect free cash flow and margins in the near term, although analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: NextNav (NASDAQ:NN) Trading Up 5.5% - Here's Why
feed.summary: NextNav (NASDAQ:NN) shares rose 5.5% on Wednesday, trading at $15.1190. Despite the price increase, trading volume was down 63%, and the company remains unprofitable with a market capitalization of $2.04 billion. Analyst ratings are mixed, with some upgrades to 'hold' but a MarketBeat consensus of 'Reduce', while insider activity shows both significant purchases and sales.

feed.title: Sigma Lithium (NASDAQ:SGML) Trading Down 7.2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Sigma Lithium (NASDAQ:SGML) experienced a 7.2% decline in its stock price, trading down to $12.59 intraday on Wednesday with significantly lower trading volume. This drop comes amidst weak analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average target price of $17.17, following downgraded ratings from firms like Citigroup and Bank of America. The company's financial fundamentals remain challenged, highlighted by a large revenue miss in its last quarterly earnings, negative net margin and ROE, and weak liquidity.

feed.title: Oric Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ORIC) Shares Down 6.8% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Oric Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ORIC) saw its shares fall 6.8% to $11.2850, with trading volume significantly below average. Despite a largely positive analyst sentiment with a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $19.90, some insiders, including CEO Jacob Chacko, have recently sold shares. The company, focused on developing small molecule therapeutics for solid tumor oncology, has a market cap of $1.11 billion and reported better-than-expected EPS in its last quarterly earnings.

feed.title: What Is Going On With Texas Instruments Stock On Wednesday? - Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN)
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) stock rose after analysts increased price targets following a strong quarter. Despite slightly missing Q4 revenue and EPS forecasts, the company's outlook signaled steadying demand, with improved order patterns, growing backlog, and strong performance in the industrial and data center segments. Analysts from Cantor Fitzgerald, Benchmark, and Rosenblatt all reiterated positive ratings and raised price targets, highlighting an anticipated broader chip-cycle recovery.

feed.title: Honeywell collaborates with SAF One and Tata Projects to enable SAF production
feed.summary: Honeywell has announced a collaboration with SAF One and Tata Projects to facilitate the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). This partnership aims to advance the availability and adoption of SAF, contributing to reduced carbon emissions in the aviation industry. The initiative highlights a joint effort to develop and implement solutions for sustainable fuel production.

feed.title: Franklin Q1 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What to Expect From the Stock
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc. (BEN) is set to report its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results on January 30, 2026, with anticipated declines in both earnings and revenues compared to the previous year. Despite favorable market conditions and a slight AUM increase, the company is expected to record net outflows, and a negative Earnings ESP combined with a Zacks Rank of 3 suggests a low probability of beating estimates. Recent developments include a partnership with Wand AI for enterprise-scale AI deployment and the acquisition of Apera Asset Management, which expanded BEN's alternative credit AUM.

feed.title: 3 Reasons Growth Investors Will Love Fair Isaac (FICO)
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) is highlighted as a strong growth stock, supported by its favorable Zacks Growth Style Score and top Zacks Rank. The article emphasizes FICO's impressive earnings growth, with a projected EPS increase of 34.6% this year, significantly outpacing the industry average. Additionally, its robust cash flow growth of 37.3% year-over-year and positive earnings estimate revisions further contribute to its appeal for growth investors.

feed.title: Here's What Investors Must Know Ahead of Weyerhaeuser's Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) is set to report its Q4 2025 results on January 29, with expectations of continued challenges in the housing and wood products environment. Analysts project a loss per share of 13 cents and a 7.2% year-over-year decline in net sales to $1.58 billion. The company's Wood Products and Timberlands segments are anticipated to see mixed results, influenced by softer demand and pricing issues, while the Real Estate segment is expected to show healthy underlying demand.

feed.title: Ryanair Earnings Came Ahead of Estimates in Q3, Revenues Up Y/Y
feed.summary: Ryanair Holdings plc reported strong fiscal Q3 2026 earnings, beating analyst estimates with 26 cents per share, though revenues of $3.74 billion slightly missed expectations but grew 18.5% year-over-year. The airline saw a 6% increase in traffic to 47.5 million passengers and projects a 4% traffic growth for fiscal 2026 to almost 208 million passengers. Despite increased operating costs from ATC and environmental fees, fuel hedge savings and efficient cost control are expected to maintain modest unit cost inflation, leading to projected full-year profits after tax between €2.13bn and €2.23bn.

feed.title: 3 Reasons Why Growth Investors Shouldn't Overlook Stantec (STN)
feed.summary: Stantec (STN) is presented as a strong growth stock due to its favorable Zacks Growth Style Score and top Zacks Rank. The article highlights three key factors: strong projected earnings growth of 13.3% for the current year, superior year-over-year cash flow growth of 17.2%, and promising upward revisions in current-year earnings estimates. These indicators suggest that Stantec is a potential outperformer for growth investors.

feed.title: Exclusive: Novo's Wegovy and Ozempic US advertising spend doubles rival Eli Lilly, data shows
authors: Harshita Mary Varghese and Patrick Wingrove
feed.summary: Novo Nordisk significantly outspent Eli Lilly on U.S. advertising for its GLP-1 drugs Wegovy and Ozempic, shelling out nearly $500 million in the first nine months of 2025, more than double Lilly’s spend on Zepbound and Mounjaro. This aggressive advertising push by Novo Nordisk, particularly for Wegovy, is seen as an effort to counter Eli Lilly's Zepbound, which showed superior weight loss results in a head-to-head trial and has since overtaken Wegovy in U.S. prescriptions for obesity drugs. The increased ad spending by both companies reflects improved drug availability after earlier shortages and highlights the competitive landscape in the GLP-1 market.

feed.title: Tesla Keeps Getting Fined in the UK for Refusing to Name Speeding Drivers
feed.summary: Tesla is facing repeated fines in the UK for failing to identify drivers involved in traffic violations, accumulating at least 18 convictions and over $27,000 in penalties since early 2024. British law requires vehicle lease providers to name drivers for prosecution, a legal obligation Tesla Financial Services has struggled to meet, citing "technical issues." Some sources suggest Tesla might prioritize customer privacy over compliance, viewing the fines as a cost of doing business.

feed.title: Apple, Visa, KLA-Tencor and more set to report earnings Thursday
feed.summary: This article highlights major companies scheduled to report earnings on Thursday, January 29, 2026. Tech giants like Apple, Visa, and KLA-Tencor, along with Western Digital and Stryker, are set to release their financial results after the market closes. The article also provides extensive lists of companies reporting earnings before the open and after the close, including estimated EPS and revenue for each.

feed.title: JKHY: DA Davidson Maintains 'Buy' Rating with $190 Price Target
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reiterated its 'Buy' rating for Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) with a consistent price target of $190, signaling confidence in the company's market position. This decision comes despite recent fluctuations in ratings from other firms, with the average analyst target price suggesting a 6.27% upside from its current price. Jack Henry & Associates is a leading provider of core processing and financial services for small and midsize US banks and credit unions.

feed.title: Sysco (SYS) Soars 11% on Upbeat Outlook
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. (NYSE:SYS) surged 11% after announcing an updated optimistic outlook for fiscal year 2026, driven by strong second-quarter sales. The company expects to reach the high end of its EPS guidance of $4.50 to $4.60, with sales increasing by 3% to $20.76 billion in Q2, despite a slight dip in net income. CEO Kevin Hourican attributed the strong performance to increased local case growth and gross margin expansion, reaffirming confidence in the company's initiatives.

feed.title: Western Digital’s Stock Boosted by Strategic Price Target Increases​
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) has seen a significant boost in its stock price, trading up by 9.25% due to strategic business mergers and numerous analyst price target increases. Mizuho, Citi, Evercore ISI, Barclays, and Rosenblatt have all raised their price targets, citing strong DRAM and NAND market expectations, AI server demand, data center investments, strategic SanDisk monetization, and advanced HAMR technology. These factors, alongside solid financial performance, underscore WDC's resilience and growth potential in the evolving tech landscape.

feed.title: Textron Aviation Logs Record Revenues, Strong Q4 Recovery
feed.summary: Textron Aviation achieved record revenues and a strong recovery in the fourth quarter, marked by a significant 53% surge in jet deliveries. This performance underscores the company's robust operational rebound and growing market presence. The article highlights these financial achievements and the factors contributing to their success.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Becton Dickinson In The Eyes Of 7 Experts
feed.summary: Seven analysts have recently provided ratings for Becton Dickinson (NYSE: BDX), resulting in a bullish to indifferent sentiment breakdown. The average 12-month price target for BDX has increased to $205.57, with individual targets ranging from $190.00 to $215.00. The article also provides a financial performance breakdown, highlighting Becton Dickinson's above-average market capitalization and strong net margin, though it notes challenges in revenue growth and returns on equity and assets compared to industry peers.

feed.title: Plans for Target in Dripping Springs unveiled
feed.summary: Retail giant Target Corp. has acquired property along U.S. Highway 290 in Dripping Springs and has revealed a timeline for the store's opening. This development is significant for other businesses looking to establish themselves near the new Target location. The article also mentions that a lot of shop and restaurant space is still available around the Target site.

feed.title: Expert Outlook: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Through The Eyes Of 13 Analysts
feed.summary: Thirteen analysts have recently provided ratings for Zimmer Biomet Holdings (NYSE: ZBH), with an average 12-month price target of $101.08, reflecting a 3.94% decrease from the previous average. While the company exhibits a solid revenue growth of 9.71% and a strong net margin of 11.54%, its market capitalization is below industry averages, and its ROE and ROA are underperforming. Analysts' opinions range from bullish to bearish, with recent adjustments to ratings and price targets providing insights into their perspectives on the company's financial health and market position.

feed.title: A compelling chart pattern is emerging in this railroad stock
feed.summary: CSX Corporation (CSX) is showing compelling bullish chart patterns across multiple timeframes, including a daily "back-and-forth" trend with higher highs and higher lows, and a larger weekly cup-and-handle breakout. This suggests potential for significant upside movement, with analysts targeting near 43 and 48, making it a noteworthy stock despite the broader market's focus on other catalysts. The stock's recovery from last year's downturn and its current technical setup indicate a constructive development for investors.

feed.title: Starbucks Corp (SBUX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Revenue Growth Amidst Profitability ...
feed.summary: Starbucks reported a 5% increase in global revenue to $9.9 billion and 4% comparable store sales growth for Q1 2026, with strong international performance and record Starbucks Rewards membership. Despite this, the company faced profitability challenges, evident in a 19% drop in EPS and declining North America operating margins due to inflation. Starbucks is initiating a two-year plan to cut $2 billion in costs and improve operational efficiency to support its long-term growth strategy.

feed.title: What Analysts Are Saying About uniQure Stock
feed.summary: uniQure (NASDAQ: QURE) has been analyzed by 11 analysts over the past three months, resulting in a mixed but predominantly bullish sentiment. While the average price target has decreased by 27.38% to $48.73, the company shows noteworthy revenue growth of 61.83% as of September 30, 2025, although its net margin remains low. Analysts' ratings provide insights into uniQure's market performance and financial health, with many lowering price targets despite maintaining "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings.

feed.title: Provident Financial Holdings Posts Higher Q2 Fiscal 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Provident Financial Holdings reported higher Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings, with net income up 65% year-over-year to $1.44 million, or $0.22 per diluted share, despite a quarterly dip. Improved net interest income and recovery of credit losses contributed to the rise, offsetting higher non-interest expenses. The company's net interest margin also increased to 3.03%, and asset quality remained strong.

feed.title: Provident Bank Named One of America’s Best Regional Banks for 2026 by Newsweek
feed.summary: Provident Bank, a subsidiary of Provident Financial Holdings, Inc., has been recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Best Regional Banks for 2026. This distinction, driven by customer feedback and a comprehensive evaluation methodology, highlights the bank's dedication to supporting local economies and communities. With over $1.2 billion in assets, Provident Bank is celebrating its 70th anniversary in 2026 and continues its commitment to customers in Riverside County, California.

feed.title: Energy Fuels stock price jumps nearly 11% on Roth upgrade as uranium spot hits $91 — traders watch what comes next
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc. (UUUU) saw its stock price jump almost 11% after Roth MKM upgraded its rating to neutral, citing improved near-term catalysts and sentiment, despite setting a price target below the current trading level. This surge comes as the uranium spot price reached $91.10 a pound, fueled by significant purchases from the Sprott Physical Uranium Trust. Additionally, traders are closely monitoring the proposed acquisition of Australian Strategic Materials by Energy Fuels, which is valued at approximately A$447 million and is anticipated to close around June 2026.

feed.title: Small cap wrap: Northstar Gold, Phunware, Ecora Royalties...
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of news from several small-cap companies. Northstar Gold received approval for multi-million dollar co-investment funding for its Cam Copper Surgical Mining Project. OKYO Pharma received positive FDA feedback for its neuropathic corneal pain clinical trial design. Phunware is narrowing its focus to the hospitality sector, Bango announced a partnership with KDDI, and Ecora Royalties reported a strong portfolio contribution for the year.

feed.title: Polaris to close manufacturing plant in Osceola, lay off 200 workers
feed.summary: Polaris announced it will close its manufacturing plant in Osceola by the end of 2026, resulting in approximately 200 job losses. This decision follows Indian Motorcycle becoming a standalone company and moving its powertrain production to Iowa. Polaris plans to wind down operations in phases, with job losses expected to begin in summer 2026, and will offer support to affected employees.

feed.title: SLB Secures Five-Year Technology Deals in Oman’s Largest Oil Concession
feed.summary: Global energy technology firm SLB has secured two five-year contracts with Petroleum Development Oman (PDO) to supply wellheads and artificial lift systems for operations in Block-6, Oman's largest oil and gas concession. The deals aim to maximize recovery from mature assets and enhance in-country value through local manufacturing at SLB’s Rusayl and Nizwa facilities, creating Omani jobs. This partnership reinforces Oman's efforts to sustain oil output and SLB's role as a key technology partner in the region.

feed.title: NVR: Earnings and revenues fell as margins compressed, but mortgage banking income rose in Q4
feed.summary: NVR's net income and revenues decreased year-over-year, primarily due to pressure on homebuilding margins from affordability and land costs. Despite this, mortgage banking income saw an increase in the fourth quarter, although overall loan production was lower. Share repurchases and higher tax rates also impacted the company's capital and earnings.

feed.title: Here's Why You Should Retain Ecolab Stock in Your Portfolio Now
feed.summary: Ecolab (ECL) is recommended for retention in portfolios due to its strong product portfolio, focus on research and development, and solid third-quarter 2025 performance. The company is benefiting from its Global High-Tech business, digital platform, and diversified solutions across various markets, despite facing macroeconomic headwinds like tariffs and foreign exchange movements. Analysts are largely optimistic about its long-term growth prospects.

feed.title: Franklin Q1 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What to Expect From the Stock
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc. (BEN) is set to report its Q1 fiscal 2026 results on January 30, 2026, with anticipated declines in both earnings and revenues from the prior year. Despite recent strategic advancements like partnering with Wand AI and acquiring Apera Asset Management, and favorable market conditions in Q4 2025, the company's Q1 earnings are expected to be 56 cents per share, showing a 5.1% decline year-over-year, and sales are projected to decrease by 4.5% to $2.15 billion. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for AUM is $1.67 trillion, with a negative Earnings ESP suggesting a low probability of beating estimates.

feed.title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Avery Dennison (AVY) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company's upcoming earnings report on February 4 will reveal if actual results align with or deviate from the consensus estimates, potentially affecting its stock price. While the Zacks Earnings ESP suggests a slight bearish sentiment, Avery Dennison has a history of beating EPS estimates three out of the last four quarters.
